entry.title: 9H Paymnet budget and 9I Commi budget Mismatch
entry.content:
We are facing the weird view in fund management after S4 HANA Migration. Our 9H payment budget consumed more than commitment budget 9I . When we checked the report and table, we find below 4 document which is triggered 9H budget only. All 4 document is 2024 year. Please find the attachment for details. 

9H (12,138,544.29) - 9I (9,906,602.82)  = Varieance 

Regards

Sarvottam Tomar

entry.title: When I used to Upload the Crystal report in SAP business One via Report and Layout Import Wizard,
entry.content: When I upload Crystal Reports to SAP Business One via the Report and Layout Import Wizard, it takes a considerable amount of time. Is there an alternative method for uploading Crystal Reports in SAP Business One that is faster?

entry.title: ABAP Debugger: organize the screen
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I've a question concerning the ABAP Debugger and how to organize the screen: when I go in debug, the proposed screen is like this:

left side, the source code is shown

right side, I've two panels, on the top one there is the 'ABAP and Screen Stack', on the bottom panel the 'Variables' list

 

now, I would like to have the top right panel simply removed, having only the variables one;

 

Do you have any idea how the settings shall be set to obtain this?

 

Thanks and bye,

Jepy F

entry.title: Re: Registration For SAP TechEd Virtual In 2024 Is Now Live!
entry.content:
Hopefully you are all having a great day! 

Calling all community members now that you are registered, to discuss "how do you prepare?" Attending virtual events can be tricky with hectic work schedules and so many commitments! It is so easy to get sidetracked and somehow not achieve 😅on what you set forth! I'm calling on a handful of SAP Champions and SAP Mentors to share how they will prepare!

How do you prepare for a virtual interactive session? How do you prepare you in advance to ensure your questions get answered? 

@agalal1, @BaerbelWinkler, @TammyPowlas , @boobboo, @Bernard, @Daniel, 

@DiegoDora, architectSAP; @Karen 😎😁🖥@LeonardoAraujo @johna69 , @Ruthvik_Chowdary , @KunalBansal 💽🖱@david_ruizb 

Prepare, prepare, prepare!! Calling all community members, champions and mentors -- share your tips?? Tag a community friend too!

entry.title: Preassignment of tax categories in customer output tax is not working in migration cockpit
entry.content:
When a customer BP is created and extended to a sales org, output tax table entries are added automatically. Once the tax categories are determined automatically, user has to just enter value for tax classification. 

While extending a customer through migration cockpit, this functionality is not working. 

How can user update this without having to manually add each tax category as there will be thousands of entries with bulk uploads?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Preassignment of tax categories in customer output ta...
entry.content:
The automatic derivation of Output tax only works via transaction BP. (Maybe also Fiori and MDG).

In migrate your data and API (technically the same) it is required to provide KNVI data explicitly. The reason is: Only the keys are determined automatically, not the values (typically 0 for not tax-relevant and 1 for tax-relevant, but it varies). But the values might be set to mandatory and then not filled, so throw an error. Even when not mandatory: the empty lines have no meaning, so there is no point of adding them automatically - except in transaction BP (or other UIs) where it enables the user to enter the values for the relevant keys. 

In conclusion, only BP will works. API or migrate your data tool will not automatically extend the output tax.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Hi Team ,

Let's go!!

Here is the data preview with new fields:

Pankaj Gupta

entry.title: SAP Result Analysis data migration from Legacy (Non SAP system) to SAP ECC system
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are currently using SAP ECC system. We are doing a rollout of a company which has a go live date of 1st August 2024 (Transfer Date is not the 1st date of the Fiscal Year) The current legacy system is a non SAP system. 

With ECC, the the revenue based result analysis will be used to determine work in progress and Reserves for Unrealized costs. 

On the go live date, the expectations is that open WBS elements will also be transferred in ECC system. 

I have the below situation:

Planning details are as below:

The planning margin is 40%

on the last day in Legacy system, there is only cost booked against the WBS

The cost is settled in the legacy system by capitalizing the cost as Work in progress. 

on the go live date 1st August'2024, we have actual costs and actual revenues

 

Note: The cost of legacy period (1500) has been posted in the ECC system and is displayed in actual values in the WBS report. 

When the KKA2 is run, the, to date actual cost, are coming as 2500 (1500 +1000) and actual revenue is coming as 3000. As the Revenue based model is selected for result analysis, the system calculates correctly the cost of sales and calculated profit based on planned revenue margin of 40%

System also calculates the WIP amount correctly as 700 for till date. 

The issue is that I am expecting that system posts an entry of 800 (1500-800=700) to reduce the WIP to bring the WIP to 700. But when the settlement is run, the system is posting additional 700 in WIP. 

Due to this the balance in WIP is becoming 2200 (1500 + 700 = 2200)

How do I get the system to get the WIP reversed by 800?

Do let me know if additional information is required from my end. 

 

Regards,

Jared Antao

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Istanbul - 2024
entry.content:
I'm excited to announce that the next SAP Inside Track event in Istanbul will take place on September, 28th!

SAP Inside Track is a community-driven event, open and free for everyone whether you are a customer, partner, freelancer or student. This full-day event will be packed with sessions on SAP technologies, offering a great opportunity to connect with fellow community members during the day. 

Thanks to NTT Data Business Solutions Türkiye for hosting the event and @Hilal_Kurt for organizing the venue and helping with all the other details. 

If you are interested in presenting, please submit your session proposals by the end of August 21th.

Please fill the form Call for Speakers until the end of the August 21th. 

Stay tuned!, next week we'll be sharing the agenda and other details.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Product Allocation Process
entry.content: @Ruthvik_Chowdary  - Request for any update on the above requirement

entry.title: Re: SAP Integrated Financial Planning export job overwrit...
entry.content:
Dear @madhavvikranth_p,

it's important to understand the plan data scope when exporting data from SAC to S/4.
If the data export from one model is overwriting the data exported from the other model, then this is related to a plan data scope overlap.

Please have a look at our documentation Examples: Financial Data Import, Example 2. It explains how the plan data scope is working. Please ensure that the filter settings of both export jobs are disjoint.

This should solve your issue.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: BADI for SAP EWM after Confirm and save WT in program /SCWM/SAPLUI_TO_CONF
entry.content:
Hello Dominik,

Thank you for your reply. I still don't understand how to access this BADI when I can't debug it?

From my understanding, I need to create an implementation of this BADI (/SCWM/IF_EX_CORE_CO_POST). However, how can I ensure that my code is correct if I can't debug it? Could you please provide some advice on this? Thank you.Best Regards

Tedi

entry.title: Re: WARNING MESSAGE - GLO_BUPLA000
entry.content:
Hi there,

as India is using taxes related to regions you have to maintain a business place for your plants in India and assign them to the plant:

1. Goto Manage your Solution or CBC and change to localization India

2. In the SSCUI 101326 maintain your business places (regions in India) that are relevant for the Indian plants

3. go to SSCUI 101316 and assign your business place to your plant

By doing so your PO will derive the business place out of the plant used and will not throw an error anymore.

Best regards

Anja

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear David,

I am writing to express my strong interest in participating in the [Digital Skills Initiative] to pursue the SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant certification in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core. This opportunity aligns perfectly with my professional goals and my passion for advancing my skills in digital transformation and human capital management solutions.

As someone currently exploring a mid-life career change, I am particularly motivated to gain new skills and certifications that will allow me to transition into a role where I can leverage my experience while embracing new opportunities. The decision to pursue the SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant certification in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core is a key part of this transition. I believe that this certification will enable me to successfully pivot into a new field, bringing a fresh perspective and valuable experience to my future career endeavors.

I am experienced HR Professional with 6+ years of experience in human resources management, now transitioning into SAP SuccessFactors consulting. Demonstrates a deep understanding of HR processes, including talent acquisition, employee relations, performance management, and organizational development. Currently expanding expertise in SAP SuccessFactors to leverage advanced HR technology for optimizing HR functions and driving strategic improvements. Strong aptitude for learning and applying new technologies, with a focus on enhancing HR efficiency and effectiveness through successful implementation and configuration of SuccessFactors modules. Proven track record in developing and executing HR strategies that align with business goals, complemented by a commitment to mastering SAP SuccessFactors to deliver innovative and impactful HR solutions.

I am particularly drawn to this certification because of its comprehensive coverage of the core elements of SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central, including data models, business rules, workflows, and security. The knowledge and skills gained through this certification will enable me to effectively contribute to improving HR processes, implementing new systems, or advancing digital transformation initiatives.

In my commitment to achieving the SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant certification in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core, I have thoroughly explored and identified valuable self-study materials on the SAP Learning website. The official resources available there, including detailed training guides, interactive learning modules, and practice exams, have provided me with the structured and comprehensive content necessary to build a strong foundation in SAP SuccessFactors. I am confident that these resources will play a crucial role in my preparation and success in the certification process.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the opportunity to contribute and grow through this initiative.

Kind Regards,

Eslam Salah

Best regards,

Meghana

entry.title: Re: Superior Commitment Item versus Sets
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We are looking to configure budget control at the superior commitment level but have encountered some difficulties. Currently, we use Cover Group and create manually after we run the FMAVCREINIT program to transfer budget from commitment item to the cover group (budget goes on the high livel). Could you advise on how to directly allocate the budget to the superior commitment item to enable budget control at that level?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: ERROR IN DOCUMENT : BKPFF $ ECPCLNT900
entry.content:
Hello!

Regarding the mentioned case, was there any solution?

entry.title: Re: Existe el proceso de Renovacion en SAP S/4HANA Cloud...
entry.content:
Hi Davycruz,

The standard scope item you're looking for is not yet available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition. However, the external refurbishment in maintenance orders is still possible with subcontracting process. Any order type can be used with maintenance activity type indicating refurbishment.And prerequisite will be that the equipment is serialized, and the material will have split valuation.

Process in short: Create a subcontracting PR for refurbished material with damaged material as component. Convert PR to PO. Through transfer postings, you can move the damaged material to vendor stock. And on goods receipt with respect to PO, the refurbished material will be received at the warehouse. And this stock can be used in the maintenance order.

Hope this helps.

BR,

Vijayalaxmi Melavanki

entry.title: Re: Calculation tool for maintenance plans
entry.content:

Try IP31 with maintenance plan scheduled. It shows material cost also. Under the resource column it shows Man power as well as material cost. materials are added in the task list. In IP31 We can see the breakup of cost.

Vaibhav Mishra

entry.title: Demystifying BTP for HCM (Live Webinar, Wednesday, August 21st, 10am - 11am ET)
entry.content:
Are you an SAP SuccessFactors HCM customer who wants to learn more about how SAP's Business Technology Platform (BTP) can extend the use of your HCM modules?

Examples of combining HCM and BTP include:

  • Building mobile applications that target specific populations (e.g., deskless workers) or address a unique, real-time need (e.g., responding to COVID protocols)
  • Automating task- or approval-heavy processes, from document compliance to sending offer letters
  • Integrating SAP products with 3rd-party systems, improving data & process management
  • Creating workforce plans that forecast future talent needs
  • Using AI and machine learning to engage candidates and recommend jobs 

Join Mick Collins of SAP SuccessFactors on Wednesday, August 21st at 10am EST for "Demystifying BTP for HCM". In this 60-minute session, Mick will explain the five pillars of BTP, provide examples of how HR customers like you can use it to extend your HCM modules, and suggest ways to get started.

Who Should Attend? This session is recommended for HR technology and administration professionals, HR leaders with an interest in new technologies, and CoE experts (e.g., Recruiting, Learning) who are exploring innovations within their specific modules.

Register Here: https://sap-se.zoom.us/webinar/register/1017216732165/WN_xdRXp8hzQWe6szCVGHlz0w#/registration

SAP SuccessFactors HCM suite SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: SUPPLIER INVOICE LIST FOR WORKFLOW APPROVAL
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

how to check supplier invoices which are ready for workflow approval...?

Is there any specific t-code or app name that we can extract list from.

entry.title: Re: Incorrect members being shown in cluster in hac
entry.content:
We had the same problem after database replication from production to testing system. We have found out that the root cause is the Cluster Island ID which is derived from the schema of the master tenant. After DB replication, this ID was the same on TEST and PROD. Thus, the system believed that all nodes belong to the same cluster.

Changing the channel name only is not enough and will end up in warnings like:

WARN [jgroups-7861,hybris-broadcast,hybrisnode-2] [UDP] JGRP000012: Nachricht von Cluster hybris-broadcast-test wurde verworfen (unser Cluster ist hybris-broadcast). Der Sender war 36f19a1b-89ce-3fb8-0468-e5e75bf9a5b4 (7 identische Nachrichten erhalten von 36f19a1b-89ce-3fb8-0468-e5e75bf9a5b4 in den letzten 67621 ms)

Additionally you have to use different mcast ports as well. Property for that is:

# Default: 45588
cluster.broadcast.method.jgroups.udp.mcast_port=45589

To be safe, we changed the mcast address as well:
# Default: 224.0.0.1
cluster.broadcast.method.jgroups.udp.mcast_address=228.0.0.1

PS: Config to change the channel name:
# Default: hybris-broadcast
cluster.broadcast.method.jgroups.channel.name=hybris-broadcast-test


Kind regards
Eddy

entry.title: Re: SAP IDM Windows Server OS upgrade impact
entry.content:
I raised SAP OSS and SAP confirmed that we can upgrade to Windows 2019 from Windows 2012 and no need to change any configuration at application layer.

 

hence closing this thread,

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: COSS table records after WBS deleting
entry.content:
Deleting PS objects only flags them as deleted, it does not remove them from the database.  You can still see deleted objects in Project Builder by selecting display deleted objects on the user settings of the transaction.

To remove them from the database you will need to archive the objects.

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoice Italy
entry.content:
Hi Cate,

it is a bit difficult to answer your question about what is "NOT" included in eInvoicing in Italy. My answer would be that everything legally required is included in the standard. Please check the documentation about this functionality to familiarize yourself:  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/4603118feda9495892abadbe8f8c3d14/6c306a8dd12e4520b234f77c9e768147.html?locale=en-US 

For the other topic please open a new question.

Best regards

Anja

entry.title: Re: Reshaping the Time Tracking Experience with SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi @ACM1,

Thank you for your comment.

No there are no such predefined rules available, business rules would be purely on customization request of the business.

Thanks

entry.title: Hello!
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have finally joined the fold after years of perusing from the sidelines.

My first introduction to SAP was roughly 10 years ago in manufacturing as an accountant and I am doing by best to keep up to speed with S/4 HANA! Most of my experience is in ECC, however I have also spent some time with R/2. While I am not a data analyst by trade, I know enough to be dangerous!

I really enjoy digging into the raw table data and marrying tables together in order to streamline and automate reporting within Power BI via data warehouse tools!

- BeanCounter

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM table /SCWM/AQUA need to remove entry categor...
entry.content:
Hi,

Firstly you have to run /SCWM/CHM_LOG to fix all inconsistency. If this doesn't solve your problem, SAP has standard report (/SCWM/CORRECT_QUANTS) for managing stock tables, such as /SCWM/AQUA, /SCWM/QUAN etc. However, customers do not have direct access to edit these database tables. If you need to correct any data in these tables, you must create a case to SAP Global.

Check the notes about the report:

3057818 - Improvements for /SCWM/CORRECT_QUANTS

3141049 - batch not displayed in /SCWM/CORRECT_QUANTS 

2584226 - correction report /SCWM/CORRECT_QUANTS - deletion of items not possible 

2826976 - /SCWM/CORRECT_QUANTS: improvements for inbound delivery changes

entry.title: Sending ERP initiated service entry sheets to Ariba Buying and from there to the network?
entry.content:
Due to customisations we are currently unable to release the create service entry sheet option in Ariba Buying to our end-users. 

Instead, our end-users are creating SeS in ECC and we are sending them back to Ariba Buying through CIG. This works fine, except that the ERP-initiated SeS which are created in Ariba Buying are not forwarded to the Ariba Network from Buying. This is different behaviour from what we see if we (manually) create a SeS directly in Ariba Buying, in which case it is sent to the network.

I suspect that the ERP-initiated SeS not being seen as a paper-based service entry sheet by Ariba Buying and therefore it is not being routed to the AN.

Does anyone know if this is a known limitation, or if there is a way to get the ERP initiated service sheets imported in Ariba Buying, and from there routed to the Network?

entry.title: Re: Advance Return Management complete configuration(SAP ARM)
entry.content:
Hello @surykumar158, thanks for this document! I have got one question: In our scenario "ship to other plant" the documents in the Return Overview differ from the one in your screenshot in your test case.
We have got a posting  "Goods movement for valuation" to post the stock from customer sales order to own stock. 
Why is this missing in your test case? I think we cannot use STO to transfert customer sales order stock.
How does it work in your test case?
Thanks and Kind regards, Gaby

entry.title: Re: Capacity Usage field configuration in SAP S4HANA Publ...
entry.content:
Hi @aman_mittal ,

did you see that the answer was already provided in the comment section?

 

"The capacity factor is without a dimension. Currently there are no plans to add more decimal places. Instead of working with decimal places it should be possible to simply multiply the capacity of the storage bin type and the consumed capacity of the product with e.g. 1000. This would then result in a maximum capacity of 100000 respectively a capacity consumption of 7,813 per EA."

 

If this answer is helping you, please accept the solution. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: PUBLIC CLOUD - Schedule Billing Output select printer
entry.content:
Hi,

There is no option to select Printer in the 'Schedule Billing Output' App. The Print queue you need, has to be maintained for Billing Document object in 'Output Parameter Determination' App under Determination Step 'Printer Settings'. Mapping between Print Queues and actual Printers has to be configured in SAP Cloud Print Manager. Please find this SAP Blog for configuration related details: Cloud Print Manager for Pull Integration - Installation and Configuration.  

Best regards,

Meghana

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud: EDI Configuration for Update/Cancel Pur...
entry.content:
Hello,

Are you sending the PO with advanced variant configuration? If yes kindly review the set-up instruction of the 2EJ scope @Step 3 (Integration SAP S/4HANA Cloud with SAP S/4HANA).

Thanks and Regards,

Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud: EDI Configuration for Update/Cancel Pur...
entry.content:
Hi,

You have to maintain the print relevant fields in order to generate output for PO changes in SSCUI "Fields Relevant to Printouts of Changes 102272, please find SAP Note for more details: 2693485 - How print relevant change fields working with S/4HANA Output Control (ak.a BRF+) in S/4Hana for purchasing documents? 

Best regards,

Meghana

entry.title: Re: Registration For SAP TechEd Virtual In 2024 Is Now Live!
entry.content:
@StephanieMarley I try to sign up for as many road map sessions as possible, and attend the first one to try to get my questions answered.  If there's an overflow, I might attend the second running of the session.

I know there are people who take time off work to attend Virtual TechEd but that's not me.  That would be even better to focus on the virtual sessions.

One year @sveabecker had a walking/running contest of sharing pictures of what was happening during Virtual TechEd, it would be great to see that again.

entry.title: old entries in FDT_ADMN_0000
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am having a strange behaviour of some previously created BRF+ Rules, e.g. CHECK_BP_ROLE for the Usage in MDG Change Requests. Our scenario is a Clean Client and a Test Client on the same box, Transport Requests are managed thorugh SCC1.

On the Clean Client, the rule is deleted and cannot be found even in FDT_WORKBENCH, however on the Test Client (same box as metnioned), the rules are avaialable and only marked for deletion.

This leads to problems when excuting the rules during SAP MDG CR processing, reuslting in the error message below on the Test Client.

Table FPT_ADMN_0000 is empty on the for the mentioned IDs in Clean Client, but there are entries on the Test Client.

Any suggestions?I have read similar posts, where the suggested solution was to delete the Rules on the Test Client, which is not recommende, I would assume and in our case not even feasible.

I ran FDT_DELETE on the Clean Client, but cannot run it on the Test Client.

Any hint is well appreciated.

Best Regards

 

Acram

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud use of shared e-mail addresses
entry.content: Hi @keinakamura , thank you for your question! It appears that there has been no further feedback from you on this topic. We therefore assume that the question could already be clarified. If your question is still valid, please send us your reply.

entry.title: Re: Customize GST report in SAP B1
entry.content: Hello Jitin,

entry.title: How do we enable deletion of active entries when using CDS based OData services with BOPF?
entry.content:
We have a CDS based OData service to perform CRUD operations, feeding a custom Fiori application. We are able to do all of the operations except delete.

We redefined the /BOBF/IF_LIB_DELETE_ACTIVE~DELETE_ACTIVE_ENTITY method, but did not write anything in it.

The service returns a successful response (HTTP 204) when delete is called with the primary keys, but the table still has the entry. 

Any suggestions on what to check?

entry.title: Re: Excel SDK installation in MAC OS for build process automation
entry.content: Hello Rakesh, Thanks for reaching out to us. Are you experiencing any errors? If so, could you please provide more details or a screenshot? This would greatly assist us in further investigating the issue.

entry.title: Re: Customize GST report in SAP B1
entry.content: I have reviewed it, but my query is about how to add the the document series field to this report? as it is not mentioned on how to edit the query. if you can please guide.

entry.title: Questions about locked/expired users
entry.content:
Hello everyone!
I am a beginner in SAP and I would like to ask you three questions:
1 - Can an SAP user with an expired account due to a defined user validity account (GLTGB) log on to the system?
2 - Is there any note from SAP about good practices to lock users even if there is an previous validity date on the account?
3 - Is there any SAP manual that mentions the validity of users and the impossibility of accessing the system with an expired account?

entry.title: Re: How to modify Notafiscal tax values in MIRO
entry.content:
None of the method has nota Fiscal details in interface.
Can you please elaborate how you did it?

entry.title: Re: No of Same Work Center
entry.content:
Hello @raviram08 

One of the possible modelling approaches is to have a single workcenter for all 7 lathe machines, model each machine a single capacity and maintain 7 capacities in the workcenter.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: How to run an VBscript in sap build process automation
entry.content: Hello Balaji, Thank you for reaching out to us. You cannot directly use VB code in the Custom Script feature; it is intended for customer JavaScript within SAP BPA.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Hi @Shilpa_Shankar ,

Here is the Data Preview of Week 2 challenge

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SUPPLIER INVOICE LIST FOR WORKFLOW APPROVAL
entry.content: Please see my response below.

entry.title: how to import budget with dtw in sap b1
entry.content:
How should I fill out the budget templates? Which columns should be filled in? Can you explain in detail? I cannot access the notes about this.

I have three templates.

-OBGT -BGT1 -BGT2

entry.title: Re: How to send mail to a specific vendor by clicking on output type for VF02
entry.content:
Hi , I hope your issue would have been already solved.

My requirement is almost same but to trigger it on save , can help with it . I want to know how it capture data/records .. or it automatically selects the current record.. plz help me.

entry.title: Re: SUPPLIER INVOICE LIST FOR WORKFLOW APPROVAL
entry.content: Hi, You may use the 'Supplier Invoices List' app to view the list of invoices and their approval status. You can filter the invoices using the 'Status' field, and then enable the fields ' Approval Status' & 'Approver' to view the approver details.

entry.title: Re: 物料出库科目替代
entry.content:
Jason2406 你好：

该需求无法实现，一般的思路是为不同类型的销售场景来创建不同的移动类型，以达到可以决定不同科目的目的。虽然公有云可以创建Z的移动类型，但是SD模块决定发货单移动类型的配置Schedule line category目前还没有开放，只能使用系统标准的。所以科目决定也只能沿用标准配置。

entry.title: Re: DI API to create fixed asset master data SAP B1 Field...
entry.content: Ola Jitin,

entry.title: Re: Powerdesigner searching for an entity by GUID in VBA
entry.content:
I have tried but can seem to get it to work Below is a portion of the script in the formatting:

sub FormatEntity(s)
dim ExAttName
dim FundamentalSA
dim EntityClass
dim FillColour
dim boolFormatEntity
dim o
set o = s.Object

output "############## FormatEntity ##############"
output o
output o.ClassKind
output o.ClassName

dim test1
dim test1object
dim test2

test1 = o.TargetObject
output "test1 " & test1
test1object = test1.object
test2 = test1object.GetExtendedAttributeText(ExAttName)
output "test2 " & test2

Output statements: 

### Symbol : Agreement of ClassKind= -2044982537 ClassName= Entity Symbol
############## FormatEntity ##############
Shortcut of entity 'Agreement'
908935660
Shortcut of entity
test1 Entity 'Agreement'

 

I get an error:

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAPUI5 Adaptation project error - Request failed with status code 401
entry.content:
This is a fiori application generator version issue run below command and it will solve this issue

npm install -g @Sap/generator-fiori@latest

you can check the version on 'i' button.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c56f622a2edf491b9f1b596b55587009/6be8f10030d848e785ebe680a43c34e2.html?version=2408.500

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Hello 😊,

Here is my submission for Task 2: 

Thanks and regards,                                                                                                                                            Oana

entry.title: Re: Physical Inventory Document Shows Book Quantity of 0...
entry.content:
Could you post MB51 for material and check how you received that inventory on ECC? Did it come from 701 or 702 or 711 or 712 and what is user ID that posted the inventory -- what is the posting and creation date?

Also add the documents on the EWM side that you have performed for this product--My understanding your stock will only go to ECC or S4 Core when you post the differences.

Please double check movement history and also confirm when you posted the differences to ECC?

Another thing to check to make sure you do not have any errors in message queue --WM MON-->Tools --Message Queue

entry.title: Re: DI API to create fixed asset master data SAP B1 Field...
entry.content: Hello Jitin Thanks for the answer, but the problem is precisely because ITM7 has a child object (ItemsDepreciationParameters), but they have the fields I need and the ITM8 table does not have an object related to the Item

entry.title: Re: Registration For SAP TechEd Virtual In 2024 Is Now Live!
entry.content:
@StephanieMarley I look for developer sessions that I categorize as unmissable and try to block that slot in my calendar. Worst case I watch the recorded session, but then I miss the live Q&A.

The rest of the time I try to leave a 'live' channel running in the background while I am working. If I pick up on something piques my interest I focus on it. It's also a useful way for me to pick up on content I may have missed when looking through the schedule.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative May 2024 Bootcamp Guide
entry.content:
@David_Chaviano , Hi David, 

Interested to join SAP Digital Skills Initiative to strengthen my skills which will be helpful in my career progress. I hope through this Digital Skills Initiative, it will be a boost to my career. I am excited to join Digital Skills Initiative to upskill my skills in SAP. I am waiting eagerly to join Digital Skills Initiative

Thank You

Regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAPUI5 Adaptation project error - Request fai...
entry.content:
This is a fiori application generator version issue run below command and it will solve this issue

npm install -g @Sap/generator-fiori@latest

you can check the version on 'i' button.

entry.title: Re: Using BTP Authentication and Destinations with SAP Build Apps (formerly AppGyver) *and deploy it
entry.content: I solve the issue by changing the authentication method for the SF destination in BTP cockpit from OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion to the BasicAuthentication. Now it works and I need to figure out how to customize the oauth2 method properly but that's another story.

entry.title: Re: Powerdesigner searching for an entity by GUID in VBA
entry.content: Take a look at some of the standard scripts, such as "C:\Program Files\SAP\PowerDesigner 16\VB Scripts\List Tables.vbs"

entry.title: Re: SAP Builds Apps using BTP Destination - 500 Internal server error: Unable to fulfill proxy requ
entry.content:
Hi mep,

I solve the issue by changing the authentication method for the SF destination in BTP cockpit from OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion to the BasicAuthentication. Now it works and I need to figure out how to customize the oauth2 method properly but that's another story.

entry.title: SAP PO inboundRA configuration
entry.content:
Dear SAP guys .

I have one simple question , e.g an ERP system wants to send IDOC to SAP PO and we have requirement to configure inboundRA connection , so there are 3 different clients on ERP so do we need to configure 3 cloned RA for that or one inboundRA ADAPTER will work ?  Please help to clarify 

Regards

Ashish Goswami

entry.title: Positive/Negative List and B1 Scenario Screening
entry.content:
Hello,

I just want to get confirmation from the group regarding this topic.

Set-up: Customer places BP on Negative list via BP transaction. However, BP transaction sometimes is flaky and the '2' was not saved in the Pos./Neg, field. So, when the B1 Screening took place, the customer was released.

When the customer finds that the BP was released, customer placed in Negative list again. This time the '2' was saved in the Pos./Neg, field. AS you know, when the next B1 Screening is negative, the BP is not released, because it is ignored, see OSS KBA 1461694.

However, when the customer goes into the Screen Neg. List Bus. Partner Addresses, the status shows a green check mark showing 'released'.

As I have tried to explain to my customer, that was the status of the last B1 screening that the BP was processed. Now that the BP has been placed in the Negative List, the following B1 screening ignored the BP and therefore does not update the audit trail.

I explained to the customer to check the current status of the BP, use Display Blocked Business Partners or Display Negative List Business Partners.

So, for confirmation, since the BP is on the Negative List, B1 screening ignores the BP and does not update the SPL audit trail... and the the audit shows the results of the later successful processing of the BP through the SPL screening scenarios.

Thank you in advance.

Regard, Dean.

entry.title: Business Application Studio - Preview language
entry.content:
Hello Community,

When I start an application in BAS, it is automatically executed in an English-language launchpad. Can this be changed?

 

regards,

Lars

It helped us a lot.
Best regards.

Duglas.
